title: Unbounded OOB data read without maximum size limit
description: In readOOB(), the message length is read as a UInt32 from the network and passed directly to readExactly(size: Int(messageLength)) at line 745 without any upper bound validation. Same as FINDING_P_001 but for the OOB data path. An attacker can trigger OOM by sending a large length value in the OOB framing header.
vulnerable_code: var messageData = try self.readExactly(size: Int(messageLength), timeout: timeout, enforceDeadline: true)
recommendation: Add maximum size validation: guard messageLength <= maxOOBSize else { throw P7SocketError.readFailed("OOB data too large") }
